release.note: Premium polish release focused on trust, clarity, and feedback.
release.improve: Refined first-run security handoff, calmer recovery-password copy, and stronger trust panel.
Contextual Android 13+ notification asks for wireless ADB pairing, batch operations, and installer progress.
Normalized Material shape language across chips, popups, bottom sheets, onboarding, widgets, and shared cards. Softened warning surfaces.
Build-expiry copy and update links now point to the AppManagerNG release / actions channels.
release.fix: Hardened the `app-manager://` and `am://` deep-link parser against crash and validation-bypass; defused CSV / formula injection in operation-history exports.
Locked down static launcher shortcuts behind a trampoline so installed apps cannot smuggle destructive batch-op extras.
Per-app locale picker now reconciles bidirectionally with the Android 13+ system Language surface.

release.note: Maintenance release closing 19 Now / Eng-Debt rows from the iter-19 / iter-20 drains.
release.new: Reproducible release pipeline: two clean builds, SHA-256 compare, per-APK sidecars.
Dependency CVE scan workflow with PR Dependency Review + weekly OWASP Dependency Check.
Upstream repo-rename watcher opens an audit issue if the upstream slug ever drifts.
Static launcher shortcuts for 1-Click Ops, Running Apps, and Finder.
`am://app/[pkg]` short alias for `app-manager://details?id=[pkg]` plus the documented intent API at docs/intent-api.md.
release.improve: Pseudolocale resources (en-XA / en-XB) on debug builds for truncation and RTL stress.
release.note: Known issue: multi-file AES-encrypted backups produced by v0.4.0 and v0.4.1 reuse the GCM IV across files and cannot be trusted to restore. OpenPGP / RSA / ECC and single-file AES backups are unaffected. See docs/audits/2026-05-08-gcm-cipher-reuse-large-backup.md.
Discovery release: Permission Inspector + Onboarding capability wizard.
release.new: Permission Inspector flips the per-app view on its head: pick a permission group and revoke across every installed app at once, with a critical-package guard.
Capability wizard detects root, Shizuku, ADB, KernelSU, APatch, Magisk, ZygiskNext, and the platform privileged shell, then explains the privilege path in plain language.
Guided Wireless ADB setup with persisted pairing metadata and ADB-over-TCP fallback.
Privacy / Gaming / Minimal OEM presets with reviewed remove vs freeze confirmation.
release.improve: w600dp density overrides and Activity Embedding master/detail on >=900dp screens.
Predictive back, themed icons, edge-to-edge, 16 KB native page-size alignment, elegantTextHeight audit clean.
Per-file AES-GCM IV derivation (backup metadata v6) closes the multi-file IV reuse for new backups; legacy backups remain restorable.

release.note: UX refresh and platform compliance baseline.
release.new: Material 3 dashboard, Pro Mode toggle, AMOLED / dark / light themes.
Edge-to-edge enforcement and predictive back for Android 15 / 16.
release.improve: Keystore passwords moved to `char[]` with explicit zeroing; ABX / XML round-trips preserve data losslessly.
Opt-in crash reporting, in-app diagnostic dump, CodeQL on main.
applicationId renamed to `io.github.sysadmindoc.AppManagerNG` so AppManagerNG installs side-by-side with upstream.
Fresh release keystore, GitHub Actions release pipeline, NG-specific CONTRIBUTING.md.

release.note: Initial AppManagerNG bootstrap from upstream App Manager 4.0.5 (commit `3d11bcb`).

AppManagerNG is a continuation of [a href="https://github.com/MuntashirAkon/AppManager"]MuntashirAkon/AppManager[/a] under GPL-3.0-or-later. Upstream credit is preserved in the README Credits section.
